title: NetworkLogEntry
description: A single entry in the network_log array captured during a browser automation session.

method.description: HTTP method of the request (e.g. GET, POST).

timing_ms.description: Round-trip time for the request in milliseconds.

trigger.description: The navigator step or user action that triggered this network request.

request_content_type.description: Content-Type header of the request (e.g. application/json, multipart/form-data).

request_body.description: Serialized request body (may be truncated for large payloads).

response_summary.description: Brief summary or excerpt of the response body.

set_cookie.description: Value of the Set-Cookie response header. May not be available for httpOnly cookies.

request_headers_note.description: Noteworthy request headers (e.g. Authorization present, Cookie sent).
